creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
www/chromium assumes cc/c++ (from PATH) is Clang thus sets is_clang=true disegarding CHOSEN_COMPILER_TYPE, CC/CXX variables are obviously ignored and on 10.4/11.1 it also hardcodes clang60 instead of using USES=compiler:c++17-lang. Not surprising that GCC build fails.

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/dads-cc.html
